California Department of Tax and Fee Administration (CDTFA). Confirmed as the base state sales tax rate effective January 1, 2017. Composed of 6.25% state rate + 1% statewide county rate. Source: https://cdtfa.ca.gov/taxes-and-fees/sales-use-tax-rates.htm

pi_items.metadata_value: California Board of Equalization base state rate 7.25% (effective 2017); New York State Department of Taxation base state rate 4.00%
pi_items.verified_value: California: 7.25% base state rate effective January 1, 2017 (California Department of Tax and Fee Administration, formerly Board of Equalization). New York: 4.00% base state rate (New York Department of Taxation and Finance).
pi_items.source: Authoritative government sources: (1) https://cdtfa.ca.gov/taxes-and-fees/sales-use-tax-rates.htm for California rate history and current rates; (2) https://www.tax.ny.gov/pubs_and_bulls/tg_bulletins/st/sales_tax_rate_publications.htm for New York base rate. Note: California Board of Equalization transferred its tax duties to CDTFA effective July 1, 2017, so technically the source attribution to 'Board of Equalization' is historically accurate for the effective date (Jan 1, 2017) but the current maintainer is CDTFA.

privileged_info_summary: The task requires configuring real published sales tax rates in Magento for a B2B equipment distributor. All metadata values have been independently verified: California base state sales tax rate is 7.25% (effective January 1, 2017, per California CDTFA); New York base state sales tax rate is 4.00% (per NY Department of Taxation and Finance). These are authentic government-published rates, not synthetic data. The task creates three interdependent items in Magento: a product tax class named 'Industrial Machinery', two tax rates at the verified percentages for CA and NY, and a tax rule linking them with priority 0.
